subject: [PATCH v4 14/14] Documentation/userfaultfd: document RWP working set tracking

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's userfaultfd feature, specifically covering read-write protection (RWP) working set tracking. It explains how RWP works, including its sync and async fault models, UFFDIO_RWPROTECT semantics, and UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC. The documentation also describes a typical workflow for VMM working-set-tracking, from detection to eviction and back to asynchronous mode.
